message:
Add 3D model fullscreen mode and quality controls to state store

Extend the Zustand state store with fullscreen viewing capabilities
and render quality management for the 3D phage model visualization:

New State Properties:
- model3DFullscreen: boolean toggle for fullscreen 3D view mode
- model3DQuality: 'low' | 'medium' | 'high' | 'ultra' render quality

New Actions:
- toggle3DModelFullscreen(): Toggles fullscreen mode with smart defaults
  - Entering fullscreen: auto-upgrades to 'high' quality, unpauses
    animation, closes any active overlay to prevent hidden UI state
  - Exiting fullscreen: returns to 'medium' quality, pauses animation
    to reduce CPU usage and prevent terminal flickering
- cycle3DModelQuality(): Cycles through quality levels in order

Behavior Changes:
- model3DPaused now defaults to true (was false) to prevent initial
  render flickering when the TUI loads - the 3D model starts paused
  and users can press P to animate or Z to enter fullscreen (which
  auto-unpauses)

This enables users to zoom into the 3D phage model for detailed
inspection with higher quality rendering, while keeping the default
picture-in-picture view lightweight and stable.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
